ideation.app_idea: SoberStreak — sobriety tracker with daily check-ins, milestones, and craving management tools
ideation.what_it_does: Tracks sober days with daily mood/craving check-ins, celebrates milestones, provides emergency coping exercises during urges, and shows money saved from not drinking.
ideation.how_it_solves: People in recovery need daily accountability and instant access to coping tools during cravings. This replaces scattered notes and calendar counting with a structured support system.
ideation.feature_set:
• Sobriety day counter with milestones
• Daily check-in (mood, cravings, triggers)
• Emergency craving toolkit (breathing, grounding)
• Money saved calculator
• Journal/reflection space
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — simple tracker with counter and journaling. No backend needed. The emotional value is extremely high for this community.

ideation.app_idea: DateReady — dating readiness self-assessment for separated/divorced individuals
ideation.what_it_does: Guides people through a structured self-assessment to determine if they're emotionally ready to date after separation, with checklists for legal, financial, and emotional readiness.
ideation.how_it_solves: People rush into dating post-separation and face stigma or emotional fallout. This provides a framework to evaluate readiness before putting themselves out there.
ideation.feature_set:
• Emotional readiness quiz
• Legal/financial readiness checklist
• Boundary-setting exercises
• Red flag awareness guide
• Dating timeline planner
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — quiz/checklist tool. Deeply personal, all local. The readiness quiz format is engaging and shareable.

ideation.app_idea: MatchIntent — dating app profile optimizer and intention clarifier for 30+ daters
ideation.what_it_does: Helps serious daters articulate what they want, craft authentic profiles, and evaluate matches against their actual values instead of superficial criteria.
ideation.how_it_solves: Dating apps reward shallow swiping. This tool forces intentionality by having users define dealbreakers, values, and goals before matching — leading to better connections.
ideation.feature_set:
• Values and dealbreaker clarifier
• Profile writing prompts and examples
• Match evaluation scorecard
• First date question generator
• Dating goal tracker
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — guided questionnaire/planner. The profile writing prompts alone are worth it. No external APIs needed.

ideation.app_idea: FermentLog — fermentation timing tracker with temperature-adjusted scheduling
ideation.what_it_does: Tracks fermentation batches with start times, temperature readings, and visual readiness indicators. Calculates expected completion based on ambient temp and starter activity.
ideation.how_it_solves: Home fermenters overbake or underfement because timing depends on temperature and starter health. This takes the guesswork out by logging variables and predicting readiness.
ideation.feature_set:
• Batch timer with temp logging
• Fermentation stage tracker
• Temperature-adjusted completion estimate
• Starter feeding schedule
• Batch history with outcome notes
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — timer/tracker with simple calculations. The sourdough community is obsessive about data. Very buildable.

ideation.app_idea: BreadDoctor — sourdough troubleshooter with visual diagnosis and fix suggestions
ideation.what_it_does: Diagnose sourdough failures by selecting symptoms (dense crumb, gummy texture, no rise, flat shape) and get specific fixes. Includes a recipe adjustment calculator.
ideation.how_it_solves: Bakers throw away failed loaves without learning why. This diagnostic tree pinpoints the likely cause and tells you exactly what to change for the next bake.
ideation.feature_set:
• Symptom-based diagnostic quiz
• Common failure cause database
• Fix suggestions with explanations
• Recipe hydration/timing calculator
• Bake log with improvement tracking
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — diagnostic quiz/calculator. The troubleshooting format is highly engaging. Pre-loaded knowledge, no API needed.

ideation.app_idea: DatePace — dating burnout tracker and intentional break planner
ideation.what_it_does: Tracks dating activity, energy levels, and emotional state to detect burnout before it happens. Suggests when to take breaks and provides re-entry prompts when ready.
ideation.how_it_solves: Daters push through fatigue and make worse choices. This validates that breaks are healthy and provides structure for when to pause and when to resume.
ideation.feature_set:
• Dating activity log
• Energy/mood tracker per date
• Burnout risk indicator
• Intentional break timer
• Re-entry readiness check
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — simple mood tracker with smart alerts. The burnout detection is just frequency + mood correlation.

ideation.app_idea: LoanLifeline — student loan default recovery guide with step-by-step action plans
ideation.what_it_does: Guides borrowers in default through the rehabilitation or consolidation process step by step, with document checklists, timeline tracking, and income-driven repayment plan comparison.
ideation.how_it_solves: Defaulted borrowers are paralyzed by complexity and shame. This breaks the recovery process into manageable steps and shows there IS a path forward.
ideation.feature_set:
• Default recovery pathway guide
• Rehabilitation vs. consolidation comparison
• Document checklist and tracker
• IDR plan calculator
• Progress milestone tracker
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — guided checklist with calculator. Life-changing for people in crisis. All pre-loaded content, no external data.

ideation.app_idea: WorthWork — self-worth journaling tool for daters dealing with comparison anxiety
ideation.what_it_does: Guided journaling prompts focused on building dating confidence, challenging comparison thoughts, and tracking personal growth milestones outside of relationship status.
ideation.how_it_solves: Dating after 30 triggers comparison anxiety ('everyone else is settled'). This reframes the narrative with evidence-based CBT exercises and personal win tracking.
ideation.feature_set:
• Daily confidence journal prompts
• Comparison thought challenger (CBT-based)
• Personal wins tracker
• Values affirmation exercises
• Progress reflection timeline
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — journaling/CBT tool. Deeply personal, all local. The CBT thought challenger is proven effective and simple to implement.

ideation.app_idea: DoughMath — sourdough recipe scaler with hydration and baker's percentage calculator
ideation.what_it_does: Scales any bread recipe up or down while maintaining correct ratios. Calculates baker's percentages, hydration levels, and adjusts proofing times for different batch sizes.
ideation.how_it_solves: Scaling bread recipes isn't linear — hydration, fermentation time, and shaping all change. This handles the math so bakers can focus on technique.
ideation.feature_set:
• Recipe scaling calculator
• Baker's percentage converter
• Hydration calculator
• Starter quantity adjuster
• Batch comparison tool
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — pure calculator. Bread bakers need this constantly. Simple math with huge practical value.

ideation.app_idea: PrepDay — batch cooking planner with scaling, timelines, and storage labels
ideation.what_it_does: Helps families plan batch cooking sessions: select recipes, auto-generate scaled shopping lists, create cooking day timelines, and print freezer labels with dates and reheating instructions.
ideation.how_it_solves: Families waste food and time because batch cooking is hard to plan. This organizes the entire flow from recipe selection to storage so nothing gets forgotten or wasted.
ideation.feature_set:
• Recipe selector with serving multiplier
• Consolidated shopping list generator
• Cooking day timeline/schedule
• Freezer label generator with reheat instructions
• Meal rotation calendar
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — calculator/planner with structured inputs. No external data needed. Families would use this weekly.

ideation.app_idea: CheckInChain — daily sobriety accountability check-in with streak tracking
ideation.what_it_does: A focused daily check-in tool that mirrors the r/stopdrinking daily pledge format. Users commit each morning, track their streak, and log reflections.
ideation.how_it_solves: The daily check-in ritual is the backbone of many people's sobriety. This makes it portable and private — no need to post publicly to maintain accountability.
ideation.feature_set:
• Morning pledge/check-in
• Streak counter with badges
• Daily reflection journal
• Trigger and craving log
• Weekly progress review
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — daily check-in tracker. Mirrors a proven community practice. Simple, powerful, deeply personal.

ideation.app_idea: HRT Navigator — menopause HRT options comparison tool with symptom tracking
ideation.what_it_does: Compare HRT types (estrogen patches, progesterone, testosterone), track symptoms before and after starting, and prepare informed questions for doctor appointments.
ideation.how_it_solves: Women are overwhelmed by HRT options and get conflicting info from doctors. This organizes the options with pros/cons and tracks whether treatment is actually helping.
ideation.feature_set:
• HRT options comparison chart
• Symptom severity tracker (before/after)
• Doctor appointment prep questions
• Side effect log
• Treatment timeline journal
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — comparison tool + symptom tracker. Pre-loaded HRT info, all tracking is local. Huge underserved market.

ideation.app_idea: CollieCoach — first-time Border Collie owner survival guide and training tracker
ideation.what_it_does: Week-by-week training plan for new Border Collie owners covering exercise needs, mental stimulation, socialization, and common behavioral issues with structured daily activities.
ideation.how_it_solves: Border Collies are intense dogs that overwhelm unprepared owners. This provides a structured first-year plan so owners and dogs thrive instead of struggle.
ideation.feature_set:
• Week-by-week training curriculum
• Daily exercise and enrichment planner
• Behavioral milestone tracker
• Common BC problem solutions
• Energy management guide
ideation.analysis: Good Wabi fit — structured guide/planner. Pre-loaded curriculum. The breed-specific focus is the differentiator from generic dog apps.

ideation.app_idea: MilestoneMap — relationship progression guide for dating over 30
ideation.what_it_does: Helps navigate relationship milestones (exclusivity talk, meeting friends, moving in) with timing guidance, conversation scripts, and compatibility assessment tools.
ideation.how_it_solves: After 30, relationship timelines are ambiguous — there's no 'normal.' This provides frameworks and conversation starters so couples align on pacing without awkwardness.
ideation.feature_set:
• Milestone timeline planner
• Conversation starter scripts
• Compatibility assessment quizzes
• Relationship values clarifier
• DTR readiness check
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — quiz/planner tool. The conversation scripts alone are worth it. All pre-loaded content.

ideation.app_idea: RawFeedOrg — raw pet food storage and meal prep organizer for small spaces
ideation.what_it_does: Helps raw feeders plan meals, manage freezer inventory, and organize storage in apartment-sized spaces. Includes portion calculators and thaw scheduling.
ideation.how_it_solves: Apartment raw feeders struggle with limited freezer space. This optimizes what to buy, when to thaw, and how to organize a small freezer for maximum efficiency.
ideation.feature_set:
• Freezer inventory tracker
• Meal portion calculator by pet weight
• Thaw schedule planner
• Shopping list generator
• Nutritional balance checker
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — inventory/calculator tool. Niche but passionate community. Simple data structure, very practical.

ideation.app_idea: FoodAid Finder — food assistance program eligibility checker and application guide
ideation.what_it_does: Input income and household size to see all food assistance programs you qualify for (SNAP, WIC, food banks, Flashfood, community fridges) with step-by-step application guides.
ideation.how_it_solves: People in food insecurity don't know what's available or assume they don't qualify. This surfaces all options and removes the guesswork from applications.
ideation.feature_set:
• Eligibility screener by income/household
• Program comparison chart
• Application step-by-step guides
• Local food bank/pantry finder
• Benefit maximization tips
ideation.analysis: Good Wabi fit — quiz/calculator with guide. Eligibility rules can be pre-loaded. Local resource finding needs location data.

ideation.app_idea: BrewLog — coffee brewing recipe tracker and extraction dial-in tool
ideation.what_it_does: Log every brew with grind size, dose, water temp, time, and taste notes. Track what works for each coffee bean so you can reproduce great cups consistently.
ideation.how_it_solves: Coffee enthusiasts change one variable at a time but lose track of what produced the best cup. This creates a searchable history of every brew attempt.
ideation.feature_set:
• Brew recipe logger (V60, espresso, French press, etc.)
• Taste rating and notes
• Bean inventory with roast dates
• Best recipe per bean finder
• Grind size reference chart
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — brewing log/tracker. The coffee community is data-obsessed. Simple data entry, powerful for dialing in.

ideation.app_idea: FogTracker Meno — menopause brain fog journal with trigger and pattern analysis
ideation.what_it_does: Daily brain fog severity logging with correlation tracking against sleep, stress, HRT doses, and cycle stage. Helps women identify their specific fog triggers.
ideation.how_it_solves: Menopause brain fog is terrifying and poorly understood. Tracking reveals patterns (worse with poor sleep, better with HRT adjustment) that empower women to manage it.
ideation.feature_set:
• Daily fog severity rating
• Trigger correlation tracker (sleep, stress, HRT)
• Pattern analysis dashboard
• Doctor-ready symptom report
• Coping strategy library
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — daily tracker with pattern analysis. The menopause-specific focus differentiates from generic brain fog trackers.

ideation.app_idea: GardenER — vegetable garden troubleshooter with visual pest/disease diagnosis
ideation.what_it_does: Diagnose garden problems by selecting symptoms (yellowing leaves, holes, wilting) and get specific treatment recommendations. Includes planting calendar and companion planting guide.
ideation.how_it_solves: Beginner gardeners lose crops to easily fixable problems because they can't diagnose the issue. This diagnostic tool catches problems early with actionable solutions.
ideation.feature_set:
• Symptom-based plant diagnostic
• Pest and disease identification guide
• Treatment recommendations
• Planting calendar by zone
• Companion planting reference
ideation.analysis: Good Wabi fit — diagnostic quiz + reference guide. Zone-based calendars add personalization. Content can be pre-loaded.

ideation.app_idea: MenoMe — body and identity grief journal for women in perimenopause/menopause
ideation.what_it_does: A guided journaling space for processing the grief of physical changes during menopause: body image shifts, identity evolution, and finding purpose in the next chapter.
ideation.how_it_solves: Women grieve their pre-menopause selves silently. This validates the experience and provides structured prompts for processing change rather than just enduring it.
ideation.feature_set:
• Guided grief processing prompts
• Body image reframing exercises
• Identity exploration journal
• Daily wins and gratitude log
• Community affirmation cards
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — guided journaling tool. Deeply emotional, entirely personal, no external data. Fills a major gap in menopause support.

ideation.app_idea: FlockDoc — backyard chicken health tracker and care guide
ideation.what_it_does: Track flock health with individual bird profiles, egg production logs, symptom checkers for common poultry diseases, and seasonal care reminders.
ideation.how_it_solves: Chicken keepers lose birds to preventable diseases because they don't spot symptoms early. Individual tracking and a symptom checker catches problems before they spread.
ideation.feature_set:
• Individual bird health profiles
• Egg production tracker
• Poultry disease symptom checker
• Seasonal care calendar
• Feed and supplement log
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — tracker with diagnostic features. The backyard chicken community is growing fast. Simple data, high practical value.

ideation.app_idea: QuoteCompare — home improvement contractor quote organizer and comparison tool
ideation.what_it_does: Organize and compare contractor quotes side-by-side with standardized line items, scope of work comparison, and red flag checklist for spotting lowball/inflated bids.
ideation.how_it_solves: Homeowners can't compare quotes because every contractor formats them differently. This standardizes the comparison so you're comparing apples to apples.
ideation.feature_set:
• Quote input and organizer
• Side-by-side comparison view
• Line item standardizer
• Red flag checker
• Contractor rating notes
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — comparison/organizer tool. Every homeowner needs this. Simple structured data entry.

ideation.app_idea: BioMod Log — body modification and biohacking implant tracker with healing protocol
ideation.what_it_does: Track body modifications, implants, and biohacking experiments with healing progress logs, complication monitoring, and maintenance schedules.
ideation.how_it_solves: Biohackers with implants need to track healing, functionality, and maintenance. There's no dedicated tool — most use scattered notes.
ideation.feature_set:
• Modification/implant inventory
• Healing progress tracker
• Complication monitoring log
• Maintenance schedule reminders
• Doctor/provider contact book
ideation.analysis: Good Wabi fit — health tracker variant. Niche audience but growing. The healing progress tracker is the key feature.

ideation.app_idea: ProfileCraft — dating app profile builder with prompts and photo selection guide
ideation.what_it_does: Step-by-step guide to building an engaging dating profile: prompt response generator, photo selection criteria, bio writing templates, and profile review checklist.
ideation.how_it_solves: People write boring profiles because they don't know what works. This provides templates and examples that showcase personality instead of generic statements.
ideation.feature_set:
• Profile writing prompts by platform
• Photo selection guide and ranking
• Bio templates by personality type
• Conversation starter suggestions
• Profile audit checklist
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — guided builder/quiz. The profile audit checklist is immediately actionable. All pre-loaded content.

ideation.app_idea: GapBridge — career re-entry planner for stay-at-home parents
ideation.what_it_does: Helps SAHPs prepare for career re-entry: skills inventory, gap explanation templates, resume rebuilder, upskilling recommendations, and confidence-building exercises.
ideation.how_it_solves: SAHPs fear re-entering the workforce because they can't articulate their skills. This reframes parenting experience as transferable skills and provides a concrete re-entry plan.
ideation.feature_set:
• Transferable skills identifier
• Resume gap explanation templates
• Upskilling recommendation engine
• Interview prep for returners
• Confidence building exercises
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — guided planner with templates. Pre-loaded content. The skills reframing exercise is the 'aha' moment.

ideation.app_idea: CarFreeCalc — car-free lifestyle savings and time calculator
ideation.what_it_does: Calculate the true cost of car ownership vs. alternatives (biking, transit, e-bike, car-share) and show annual savings, health benefits, and environmental impact.
ideation.how_it_solves: People don't realize how much cars actually cost when you add insurance, maintenance, parking, and depreciation. This makes the financial case for going car-free or car-light.
ideation.feature_set:
• True car cost calculator (all expenses)
• Alternative transport cost comparison
• Annual savings projector
• Health benefit estimator (calories burned)
• CO2 reduction calculator
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — pure calculator. The r/fuckcars community would love sharing these numbers. Simple math, high emotional impact.

ideation.app_idea: BulkTimer — bulk fermentation calculator with temperature and time variables
ideation.what_it_does: Input your dough temperature, starter percentage, and desired sourness level — get an optimized bulk fermentation schedule with timing windows and visual readiness cues.
ideation.how_it_solves: Bulk fermentation is the #1 failure point in sourdough. This calculates timing based on your specific conditions instead of following generic recipe times.
ideation.feature_set:
• Temperature-based fermentation calculator
• Starter percentage adjuster
• Visual readiness guide
• Ambient temp logger
• Batch outcome tracker
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — specialized calculator. Sourdough bakers check fermentation timing constantly. Simple formula, huge practical value.

ideation.app_idea: LoanNav — student loan repayment plan comparison calculator post-SAVE collapse
ideation.what_it_does: Compare all current IDR plans (IBR, PAYE, ICR) side-by-side with your specific income, family size, and loan balance. Shows monthly payments, total paid, and forgiveness timelines.
ideation.how_it_solves: After SAVE collapsed, borrowers don't know which plan to switch to. This calculates the real cost of each option so they can make an informed choice.
ideation.feature_set:
• IDR plan comparison calculator
• Monthly payment estimator by plan
• Total cost over loan life
• Forgiveness timeline projector
• Plan switch impact analysis
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — pure calculator. Timely (SAVE collapse is current news). The comparison format makes a complex topic accessible.

ideation.app_idea: KidPlan — age-appropriate activity idea generator for stay-at-home parents
ideation.what_it_does: Input your child's age and available materials, get curated activity suggestions. Filters by indoor/outdoor, prep time, mess level, and developmental benefits.
ideation.how_it_solves: SAHPs run out of activity ideas daily. This provides an endless supply filtered by practical constraints so parents spend less time planning and more time playing.
ideation.feature_set:
• Activity generator by age group
• Filter: indoor/outdoor, prep time, mess level
• Materials needed checklist
• Developmental benefit tags
• Favorites and activity log
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — content generator/filter tool. Pre-loaded activity database. The filtering by practical constraints is the killer feature.

ideation.app_idea: BeanVault — all-in-one coffee management app (beans, brews, gear, and preferences)
ideation.what_it_does: Unified coffee tracking: bean inventory with roast dates, brew recipes per method, gear maintenance log, and taste preference profile that helps discover new beans you'll love.
ideation.how_it_solves: Coffee people use 3-4 separate tools for beans, brewing, and gear. This consolidates everything and connects the dots — 'you liked this light roast, try these similar ones.'
ideation.feature_set:
• Bean inventory with freshness tracking
• Multi-method brew recipe log
• Gear maintenance reminders
• Taste preference profiler
• Coffee discovery suggestions
ideation.analysis: Good Wabi fit — multi-tracker. The preference profiler is ambitious but a simple rating system works. The all-in-one angle is the differentiator.

ideation.app_idea: QuickFit — effective 20-minute workout generator for time-constrained women
ideation.what_it_does: Generates quick, effective workouts based on available time (15-30 min), equipment, and fitness goals. Includes progression tracking and deload week guidance.
ideation.how_it_solves: Women skip workouts because they think they need 60 minutes. This proves that 20 focused minutes is enough and removes the planning barrier entirely.
ideation.feature_set:
• Workout generator by time/equipment
• Exercise library with form cues
• Progressive overload tracker
• Deload week scheduler
• Workout history and streaks
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — workout generator/tracker. Simple logic (randomized from curated exercises). Women's fitness is underserved.

ideation.app_idea: SleepReset Meno — menopause sleep disruption tracker and intervention log
ideation.what_it_does: Track sleep quality alongside menopause symptoms (hot flashes, night sweats, anxiety), HRT adjustments, and sleep hygiene interventions to find what actually helps.
ideation.how_it_solves: Menopausal women try everything for better sleep but can't tell what works because they change multiple things at once. Structured tracking reveals the actual solutions.
ideation.feature_set:
• Sleep quality rating with symptom log
• Hot flash/night sweat frequency tracker
• Intervention effectiveness tracker
• Sleep hygiene checklist
• Doctor-ready sleep report
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — sleep tracker variant with menopause focus. The symptom correlation is simple but powerful.

ideation.app_idea: CoffeeOS — unified coffee app covering brewing, bean tracking, equipment, and tasting
ideation.what_it_does: A single app for the complete coffee journey: track beans from purchase to last cup, log brews, maintain equipment, and build your palate with structured tasting notes.
ideation.how_it_solves: Coffee tools are fragmented — one for brewing, another for beans, another for gear. This connects the full workflow in one place.
ideation.feature_set:
• Bean tracker with freshness alerts
• Brew recipe library by method
• Equipment maintenance log
• Structured tasting notes
• Cost per cup calculator
ideation.analysis: Good Wabi fit — comprehensive tracker. The cost-per-cup calculator is the surprising hook. Slightly complex but each module is simple.

ideation.app_idea: GearUp — camping gear upgrade priority calculator with experience-based recommendations
ideation.what_it_does: Input your current gear and camping style — get a prioritized upgrade list based on comfort/weight impact per dollar. Stops you from buying the wrong thing first.
ideation.how_it_solves: Campers upgrade gear randomly instead of strategically. This shows that a $200 sleeping pad upgrade matters more than a $400 tent upgrade for comfort.

• Current gear inventory
• Upgrade priority ranker (impact/$)
• Gear comparison tool
• Weight savings calculator

ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — calculator/ranker tool. The prioritized upgrade list is a novel concept. Pre-loaded gear categories.

ideation.app_idea: MenoTrack — comprehensive menopause symptom and HRT dose adjustment tracker
ideation.what_it_does: Track all menopause symptoms daily, log HRT dose changes, and see how adjustments affect symptoms over weeks. Generates reports to show doctors the full picture.
ideation.how_it_solves: Women adjust HRT without tracking results, so they can't tell if changes helped. This provides clear before/after data for informed dose discussions with doctors.

• HRT dose change log
• Symptom trend graphs

ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — symptom tracker with HRT focus. The doctor report generator is the killer feature. All local data.

ideation.app_idea: RenoRegret — pre-renovation decision checklist with crowd-sourced regret data
ideation.what_it_does: Before starting a renovation, go through a structured decision checklist covering common regret areas. Includes lessons from others' regrets organized by project type.
ideation.how_it_solves: Homeowners rush into renovations and regret decisions they can't undo. This forces a methodical review of common pitfalls before money is spent.
ideation.feature_set:
• Room-by-room renovation checklist
• Common regret database by project type
• Contractor comparison scorecard
• Budget vs. actual tracker
• Decision journal with photos

ideation.app_idea: K9Train — dog training progress tracker with reactive dog management protocols
ideation.what_it_does: Track training sessions, behavior triggers, and progress for reactive dogs. Includes desensitization protocols, threshold distance logging, and vet behaviorist prep tools.

ideation.feature_set:
• Training session logger

• Desensitization protocol templates
• Progress timeline with milestones
• Vet behaviorist appointment prep

ideation.app_idea: FretBoard — music notation learning path generator for self-taught guitarists
ideation.what_it_does: Progressive music theory lessons starting from 'I know nothing about notation' to reading sheet music. Includes guitar-specific tab-to-notation translation exercises.

• Daily practice exercises

ideation.app_idea: OneSalary — single-income household budget planner and financial safety net builder
ideation.what_it_does: Budget planner designed specifically for single-income families: tracks essential vs. discretionary spending, builds emergency fund targets, and plans for the SAHP's financial security.

• Emergency fund builder with milestones
• SAHP financial safety checklist

ideation.app_idea: CheckDetox — portfolio checking habit tracker and market anxiety reducer
ideation.what_it_does: Tracks how often you check your portfolio, shows the correlation between checking frequency and anxiety, and provides CBT-based exercises to break the compulsive checking habit.
ideation.how_it_solves: Obsessive portfolio checking increases anxiety without improving returns. This makes the behavior visible and provides alternatives when the urge strikes.
ideation.feature_set:
• Portfolio check frequency logger
• Anxiety vs. checking correlation chart
• CBT urge-surfing exercises

ideation.app_idea: ThriftFlip — thrift find value estimator and profit tracker for resellers
ideation.what_it_does: Log thrift finds with purchase price, estimated market value, and resale outcome. Tracks your thrifting ROI and identifies your most profitable categories.
ideation.how_it_solves: Thrifters buy impulsively without tracking returns. This adds financial clarity and helps focus on high-value finds.
ideation.feature_set:
• Item logging with photo and price
• Market value estimator by category
• Resale profit tracker
• Best categories analysis

ideation.analysis: Excellent Wabi fit — expense/profit tracker. Simple data entry, powerful for the thrifting community.

ideation.app_idea: KidCal — children's activity schedule manager and overscheduling detector
ideation.what_it_does: Track all children's activities with time commitments, costs, and stress levels. Flags overscheduling and helps families prioritize activities that align with the child's interests.
ideation.how_it_solves: Parents don't realize they're overscheduling until everyone is burned out. This makes the total time/cost/stress visible so families can make intentional choices.

• Activity schedule with time tracking
• Per-child activity load visualizer
• Cost calculator across all activities

ideation.app_idea: FlareLog — fibromyalgia symptom and flare tracker with trigger pattern detection
ideation.what_it_does: Track daily symptoms, pain levels, and potential triggers. Over time identifies personal flare patterns so patients can anticipate and prevent episodes.
ideation.how_it_solves: Fibro patients can't predict flares because they don't systematically track triggers. This reveals patterns like 'weather changes + poor sleep = flare in 2 days.'
ideation.feature_set:
• Daily symptom severity tracker
• Trigger logging (weather, stress, activity, sleep)
• Flare pattern detection
• Medication effectiveness log
• Doctor appointment summary generator
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — symptom tracker with pattern analysis. Chronic illness trackers have proven demand. Simple data, life-improving insights.

ideation.app_idea: ACA Cliff Calc — early retirement income planner to maximize ACA subsidies
ideation.what_it_does: Models how much income you can take in early retirement while staying below the ACA subsidy cliff. Calculates optimal Roth conversions and capital gains harvesting.
ideation.how_it_solves: Going $1 over the ACA cliff can cost $10K+ in lost subsidies. This calculator shows exactly how much room you have and which income sources to tap.
ideation.feature_set:
• ACA subsidy cliff calculator
• MAGI income planner
• Roth conversion optimizer
• Capital gains harvesting guide
• Year-by-year income strategy planner
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — financial calculator. The ACA cliff is a very specific, high-stakes math problem. Perfectly suited for a focused tool.

ideation.app_idea: StealthFIRE — guide to keeping FIRE plans private at work while staying motivated
ideation.what_it_does: Provides strategies for maintaining career ambition appearance while pursuing FIRE. Includes conversation deflection scripts, motivation tracking, and countdown tools.
ideation.how_it_solves: Employers penalize workers who seem 'checked out.' This helps FIRE pursuers stay motivated and discreet while counting down to freedom.
ideation.feature_set:
• FIRE countdown timer
• Conversation deflection scripts
• Career maintenance checklist
• Motivation journal
• Milestone celebration tracker
ideation.analysis: Good Wabi fit — planner/journal. The deflection scripts are unique and practical. The countdown timer is emotionally satisfying.

ideation.app_idea: DayFlow — daily routine builder and maintenance tool for stay-at-home parents
ideation.what_it_does: Creates flexible daily routines (not rigid schedules) with blocks for meals, naps, activities, and rest. Adapts when things go sideways and helps SAHPs maintain structure.
ideation.how_it_solves: SAHPs struggle between rigid schedules that fail and no structure at all. This flexible routine approach provides enough structure to stay sane without constant pressure.
ideation.feature_set:
• Flexible routine block builder
• Age-appropriate schedule templates
• 'Things went sideways' recovery mode
• Routine adherence tracker
• Self-care block reminders
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — schedule/routine builder. The 'recovery mode' for bad days is the differentiator. Pre-loaded templates by age.

ideation.app_idea: TrainerMatch — qualified dog trainer finder with specialty and method filters
ideation.what_it_does: Search for dog trainers filtered by specialty (reactive dogs, aggression, separation anxiety), training method (positive reinforcement, balanced), location, and verified credentials.
ideation.how_it_solves: Finding a qualified trainer for a reactive dog is a nightmare — most trainers aren't equipped. This filters by the specific expertise needed.
ideation.feature_set:
• Trainer search by specialty
• Training method filter
• Credential verification indicators
• Client review system
• Consultation prep checklist
ideation.analysis: Poor Wabi fit — needs a trainer database, location data, and reviews. Better as a full directory service, not a micro-app.

ideation.app_idea: CatCheck — cat health symptom checker and vet visit decision tool
ideation.what_it_does: Input cat symptoms and get guidance on urgency level (emergency, vet soon, monitor at home). Includes a home health check routine and symptom progression tracker.
ideation.how_it_solves: Cat owners panic or wait too long because they can't assess symptom severity. This triage tool helps them make better decisions about when to seek vet care.
ideation.feature_set:
• Symptom urgency checker
• Home health check routine
• Symptom progression tracker
• Common cat illness reference
• Vet visit prep notes
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — diagnostic quiz/reference. Pre-loaded symptom database. The urgency triage is the killer feature.

ideation.app_idea: ThriftID — thrift store find identifier with quick value lookup and photo logging
ideation.what_it_does: Document thrift finds with photos, notes, and quick value estimates. Builds a personal treasure-hunting log and helps identify valuable items by brand, era, and category.
ideation.how_it_solves: Thrifters miss valuable items because they can't quickly assess worth in-store. This builds pattern recognition over time and creates a satisfying collection log.
ideation.feature_set:
• Photo-based find logger
• Brand/era identification guide
• Value range estimator by category
• Personal treasure archive
• Most valuable finds leaderboard
ideation.analysis: Good Wabi fit — photo logger with reference data. The identification guide can be pre-loaded. Fun and practical.

ideation.app_idea: CanSafe — canning recipe safety validator and processing time calculator
ideation.what_it_does: Check if a canning recipe is safe by cross-referencing USDA guidelines, calculate correct processing times by altitude, and track your canning inventory with best-by dates.
ideation.how_it_solves: Food safety anxiety stops people from canning, and bad recipes cause real danger. This validates recipes against trusted sources so canners can preserve with confidence.
ideation.feature_set:
• Recipe safety validator (USDA cross-reference)
• Altitude-adjusted processing time calculator
• Canning inventory with best-by dates
• Trusted recipe library
• Equipment checklist
ideation.analysis: Perfect Wabi fit — safety checker/calculator. The altitude adjustment and safety validation are simple rules with huge peace-of-mind value.
